scripts.security:osv: osv-scanner scan source -r . --experimental-exclude node_modules --experimental-exclude .next --experimental-exclude .tmp --experimental-exclude security-reports --experimental-exclude security-scan-artifacts
scripts.security:semgrep: uvx --from semgrep semgrep scan --config p/default --metrics off --severity ERROR --exclude node_modules --exclude .next --exclude .tmp --exclude security-reports --exclude security-scan-artifacts .
scripts.security:trivy: trivy fs --scanners vuln,misconfig --skip-dirs node_modules --skip-dirs .next --skip-dirs .tmp --skip-dirs security-reports --skip-dirs security-scan-artifacts --severity HIGH,CRITICAL --exit-code 1 .
scripts.security:quick: npm run security:audit:prod && npm run security:audit && npm run security:osv && npm run security:gitleaks && npm run security:semgrep
